THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LIPPERT, ANTHONY W LEINSS, HEATHER THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 310 SEVENTH ST, SAN FRANCISCO, CA. 94103 $8,212.59 RENT, $1,150.00 ATTORNEY FEES, TOTAL JUDGMENT $9,362.59, LEASE FORFEITED, PLUS COSTS PER COST BILL.
